name: Hominy & Chicken Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the stuffing and the next five ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Stir together the remaining ingredients (except cheese) and combine with the stuffing mix.
3. Pour into a lightly greased 2-quart shallow baking dish.
4. Cover lightly with foil and bake at 350°F for 35 minutes.
5. Uncover, sprinkle with cheese, and bake an additional 5 minutes or until cheese is melted and bubbly.
